# Code of Conduct

The AI-Ops Framework community is committed to creating a respectful, inclusive, and collaborative environment for all contributors.

## Our Standards

We expect all participants to:

* Treat others with respect and professionalism
* Provide constructive feedback
* Collaborate in good faith
* Avoid harassment, discrimination, or abusive behavior

## Unacceptable Behavior

Examples include:

* Personal attacks
* Derogatory comments
* Harassment of any kind
* Disruptive or hostile behavior
* Publishing others' private information

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may take appropriate action in response to unacceptable behavior, including:

* Warnings
* Temporary or permanent bans
* Rejection of contributions

## Reporting Issues

If you experience or witness a violation of this Code of Conduct, please report it confidentially by contacting the governance board directly at governance@maryjane.company. All reports will be reviewed promptly and handled with strict confidentiality.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from widely used open-source community guidelines.
